overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a player exploring a frontier town during a thunderstorm at night. The player peers through saloon windows, ascends a balcony for an overview, then walks through the muddy streets as lightning illuminates the wooden buildings.

agents.ego_description: peering through windows into the dimly lit saloon interior while moving along the wooden walkway

entered.detail: large paned window revealing the warm interior of the saloon
round wooden table with chairs visible through the window
warm glowing oil lamp on the table inside the saloon
weathered wooden planks of the exterior walkway
dark wooden wall of the saloon building
wooden chair visible through the window

segments.scene_description: The player moves along the exterior walkway of a wooden saloon, peering through large windows at the dimly lit interior furnished with wooden tables, chairs, and warm oil lamps. The scene is sheltered under the building's overhang with no sky visible.

events.description: ascends wooden stairs from ground level to elevated balcony
turns to overlook the town center from the balcony railing

agents.ego_description: climbing wooden stairs to reach the balcony and surveying the frontier town below

entered.detail: steep wooden staircase leading to the upper level
rough wooden handrail along the stairs
wooden railing at the balcony edge overlooking the town
cluster of wooden frontier buildings with lit windows scattered across the dark landscape
bright campfire burning in the center of the town square
unpaved dirt street running through the town
closed wooden door with metal hardware at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The player ascends a wooden staircase to an elevated balcony, gaining a wide view of the frontier town below. The scene opens up to full sky visibility with scattered wooden buildings, a central campfire, and dirt roads visible in the moonlight.

events.description: bright lightning flash illuminates the distant sky behind the building

agents.ego_description: moving along the building exterior and observing NPCs through the upper floor saloon windows

notable_agents.action: man in hat standing at the bar inside the saloon, visible through the window

entered.detail: upper floor window with grid panes looking into the saloon
long wooden bar with bottles visible inside the saloon
dark wooden wall of the upper floor

segments.scene_description: The player moves along the narrow upper floor exterior walkway, peering through windows at an NPC inside the saloon. A lightning flash briefly illuminates the scene as the player continues along the sheltered corridor.

events.description: rain begins to fall heavily, wetting the dirt roads and creating puddles
bright lightning strike illuminates the entire townscape

agents.ego_description: walking through the muddy town streets past horses and wooden buildings during the thunderstorm

notable_agents.action: horse tied to hitching post, standing still
horse standing near the building entrance

entered.detail: two-story wooden frontier building with lit windows
wooden wagon with canvas cover parked on the street
metal railroad tracks running along the dirt road
rain-soaked dirt road with reflective puddles
prominent two-story wooden building with bright interior lights

segments.scene_description: The player descends to ground level and walks through the open dirt streets of the frontier town during a heavy thunderstorm. Horses stand near the buildings, wagons are parked along the road, and lightning periodically illuminates the wet, muddy ground as rain continues to fall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the sheltered intimacy of a saloon's exterior into the expansive, storm-lashed streets of a frontier town. It begins along a wooden walkway, peering through windows into a dimly lit interior filled with oil lamps and wooden furniture. As the camera ascends a wooden staircase, the scene opens up to an elevated balcony providing a wide view of the town's dirt roads and a central campfire under the moonlight. The perspective then shifts back to a sheltered upper corridor where a flash of lightning illuminates an NPC inside the building before the camera descends to ground level. Finally, the movement leads into the open air of a heavy thunderstorm, where rain falls on parked wagons and horses while periodic lightning strikes brighten the wet, muddy ground.
